steps.title: Spot the opening comma
steps.content: A comma after “that” marks the start of an interrupting phrase “through community involvement and scientific study.” The rest of the sentence must account for this opening punctuation.

steps.title: Provide the closing punctuation
steps.content: Parenthetical phrases opened by a comma must be closed by a comma. Choice B provides this closing punctuation, while A, C, and D each fail to enclose the phrase. That matches choice B — B is correct.
